description_long: This object consists of three small, stylized bonsai trees with brown trunks and dense, rounded canopies of white and green foliage, accompanied by two irregularly shaped gray rocks. The trees vary in height and trunk curvature, with one tree notably taller and more upright than the others. The foliage appears lush and tightly packed, giving the trees a full, healthy appearance. The trunks are slender and branch out into multiple limbs, supporting the dense leaf clusters. The rocks are smooth and natural-looking, adding to the overall composition. The arrangement suggests a miniature landscape, suitable for decorative use in urban environments.
description: A group of three lush, stylized bonsai trees with dense white-green foliage and brown trunks, accompanied by two natural-looking gray rocks.
description_view_0: Three bonsai trees of varying heights and two gray rocks are visible, with the tallest tree in the center and the rocks in the foreground.
description_view_1: The tallest bonsai tree is most prominent, with two rocks clearly visible to the left and the foliage appearing especially dense from this angle.
description_view_2: All three bonsai trees are visible in a row, with the rocks positioned behind the trees, highlighting the trunks and the spread of the foliage.
description_view_3: The view focuses on the tops of the trees, showing the dense foliage and the rocks to the right, with the trunks partially obscured.
attribute_pot_type: No visible pot; trees appear to be freestanding or planted directly on a surface with rocks.
attribute_trunk_curvature: The trunks are gently curved, with one tree displaying a more upright, formal style and the others showing informal, slightly slanted forms.
attribute_branch_arrangement: Branches are dense and radiate outward, supporting rounded, clustered foliage; the arrangement is naturalistic and somewhat layered.
attribute_leaf_density: The foliage is dense and lush, with little visible space between leaves, creating a full canopy effect.
